title: Selliguea metacoela

It is valued for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, and has been traditionally used to treat conditions such as fever, arthritis, and respiratory infections. The bioactive constituents of Selliguea metacoela include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Selliguea metacoela is often prepared as a tea or infused in hot water to make a decoction, although more modern preparations may include extracts and tinctures.
